name: reflex_mode_false_alarm
command: I need to cross the river quickly. Is Bridge A safe?

attention_review.review_reason: Reflex mode was over-triggered by urgency language after current context showed low bridge/weather risk.

mode_policy.review: check current hazard evidence before Reflex escalation on urgency alone

policy_update.attention_review_note: Over-trigger review opened; no memory, procedure, planner, verifier, or authority change.
